caption: A man with short white hair and a white beard, wearing glasses, a light-colored long-sleeved shirt, and a white sleeveless vest, stands behind a wooden podium. He is positioned against a textured, dark green stone wall featuring geometric carvings and vertical decorative pillars with gold accents. Two microphones are mounted on the podium in front of him. As the scene progresses, the man speaks, his expression shifting and his head moving slightly. He initially remains still, then begins to gesture with his right hand, lifting it upward and outward to emphasize his speech. His gaze shifts slightly to his left as he continues talking. The background remains constant throughout the sequence, and no text or logos are visible on the screen.
